brand.name: SnapAlign
brand.description: Premium mobile accessories for the Indian market. Specializing in tempered glass, cases, and charging solutions.

navigation.rules: Fixed hamburger icon top-left. Clicking slides out a full-height dark panel (bg-[#0A0A0A] with border-r border-white/10). Backdrop blur on the overlay. Use fixed z-50 for hamburger.

product_card.layout: Vertical stack. Image container (aspect ratio 4/5, bg-[#0A0A0A], rounded-t-xl), Details container (p-4 or p-5). 1px border border-white/10.
product_card.hover_effects: Image subtle scale (group-hover:scale-105). 'Quick Add' button appears on hover overlaying the image, or sits persistently at bottom.
product_card.pricing: Current price in primary text (INR ₹). Compare At price in muted text with line-through alongside.
product_card.badges: Overlay on top-left of image or within content. 'International Brand', 'Precision Fit'. Use tiny uppercase text with electric blue accent or icon.

buttons.primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white hover:bg-[#005BB5] transition-colors px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-medium inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-medium
buttons.quick_add: w-full bg-white/10 hover:bg-[#007AFF] text-white backdrop-blur-md transition-all py-3 rounded-lg font-medium mt-4

whatsapp_float.style: bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(37,211,102,0.3)] hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer

admin_dashboard.style: Dense, technical, bento-grid layout. 1px borders (border-white/10). Flat background #000000. Use Phosphor Icons for side nav.
admin_dashboard.features: Sales Intelligence charts, Warehouse stock tables, Dead Stock tracker with danger colors (#FF3B30), CSV export buttons.

order_tracking.layout: Minimalist centered card layout on /track page. Input field for tracking number + 'Track Order' button. Technical step-by-step progress bar on result.

hero_banner.description: Abstract streaks of light on a dark background for premium tech hero section

interactions_and_motion.hover: Smooth color and opacity transitions (duration-200 ease-in-out). Image scaling inside overflow-hidden wrappers.
interactions_and_motion.active: Scale down slightly (active:scale-95) for tactile feedback.
interactions_and_motion.page_load: Staggered fade-up for product grids using framer-motion or simple CSS animations.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio against dark backgrounds. Use text-shadow if placed over images.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='quick-add-button', data-testid='hamburger-menu').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the storefront and the admin dashboard within the same application.
Implement a persistent Sidebar Navigation sliding out from the left edge when the hamburger icon is clicked.
Set up the 3-column product grid with semantic HTML. Ensure the strike-through pricing is accessible.
Add 'International Brand' and 'Precision Fit' trust badges directly over the product images or within the card details.
Integrate a floating WhatsApp button in the bottom right corner with fixed positioning.
For the Admin dashboard, construct a dense Bento Grid showing Sales Intelligence, Dead Stock, Warehouse Stock, and provide a CSV export button.
Create a public /track page with a minimalist, high-tech interface for order tracking.
Strictly follow the color palette, prioritizing deep blacks (#000000) and electric blue (#007AFF) accents.
